Package neqsim.process.equipment.distillation

Class DistillationColumn.ColumnSideDrawSpecification

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.distillation.DistillationColumn.ColumnSideDrawSpecification
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
DistillationColumn
public static class DistillationColumn.ColumnSideDrawSpecification extends Object implements Serializable
Flow specification for a side-product draw.

The column uses this specification as a tear variable by adjusting the corresponding tray side-draw fraction until the withdrawn stream flow matches the target flow.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol

  • Constructor Details

    • ColumnSideDrawSpecification

      public ColumnSideDrawSpecification(int trayNumber, DistillationColumn.SideDrawPhase phase, double targetFlowRate, String flowUnit)
      Create a side-draw flow specification.
      Parameters:
      trayNumber - bottom-up tray index where the draw is located
      phase - side-draw phase
      targetFlowRate - target side-draw flow rate
      flowUnit - flow-rate unit for the target and actual flow
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if phase is null, target flow is negative or non-finite, or the flow unit is empty

  • Method Details

    • getTrayNumber

      public int getTrayNumber()
      Get the draw tray number.
      Returns:
      bottom-up tray index

    • getPhase

      public DistillationColumn.SideDrawPhase getPhase()
      Get the side-draw phase.
      Returns:
      side-draw phase

    • getTargetFlowRate

      public double getTargetFlowRate()
      Get the target side-draw flow rate.
      Returns:
      target flow rate in getFlowUnit()

    • getFlowUnit

      public String getFlowUnit()
      Get the flow unit used by this specification.
      Returns:
      flow unit string

    • getTolerance

      public double getTolerance()
      Get the relative convergence tolerance.
      Returns:
      relative tolerance

    • setTolerance

      public void setTolerance(double tolerance)
      Set the relative convergence tolerance.
      Parameters:
      tolerance - positive finite relative tolerance

    • getMaxIterations

      public int getMaxIterations()
      Get the maximum number of tear iterations requested by this specification.
      Returns:
      maximum iterations

    • setMaxIterations

      public void setMaxIterations(int maxIterations)
      Set the maximum number of tear iterations requested by this specification.
      Parameters:
      maxIterations - positive maximum iteration count

    • getLastActualFlowRate

      public double getLastActualFlowRate()
      Get the latest actual flow rate.
      Returns:
      latest actual flow rate in getFlowUnit(), or Double.NaN

    • getLastRelativeResidual

      public double getLastRelativeResidual()
      Get the latest relative residual.
      Returns:
      relative residual from the latest side-draw update

    • updateActualFlowRate

      private double updateActualFlowRate(double actualFlowRate)
      Store latest actual flow and return its relative residual.
      Parameters:
      actualFlowRate - actual draw flow rate in getFlowUnit()
      Returns:
      relative residual
